prompt: /imagine prompt: A Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style scene from Edo period, showing a traveler descending a winding mountain path step by step toward a calm valley. The path spirals downward through stylized hills and layered landscapes. Flat color blocks, strong outlines, visible woodgrain texture, muted indigo and ochre palette. Hokusai-inspired composition, diagonal flow, minimal shading, atmospheric perspective. The lowest valley is calm and centered, representing convergence. No text, no labels, no modern elements --ar 1:1 --v 6.1 --stylize 200 --quality 2
tradition_approach: Flat color blocks, strong contour lines, diagonal composition, and atmospheric perspective inspired by Hokusai to represent iterative descent toward a minimum.
